Book Fair 2025

Join us at the Book Fair at Hotel Clarks Amer, Jaipur for an unforgettable literary experience!

Activities at the Book Fair

Author Meet & Greet

Meet your favorite authors in person, ask them questions, and get your books signed!

Workshops

Participate in writing workshops, learn about publishing, and get inspired!

Book Reading

Join live book reading sessions with renowned authors.

Book Genres

Fiction

Explore the world of fiction with bestsellers, classics, and new releases.

Non-fiction

Dive into inspiring true stories, self-help books, and biographies.

Science Fiction

Get ready for thrilling adventures with futuristic concepts and technology.

Children's Books

Bring your kids and explore an exciting range of children’s literature.
